title: isoloma angustum
intro: Isoloma angustum is a plant species that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae, commonly known as the filmy ferns, and is native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Isoloma angustum include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are believed to be effective in harnessing its medicinal properties and providing relief from various health conditions.
